subcodes.first_line: O benevolent one of the world of humanity! Praise be to God that you possess a pure heart, which is delighted by the glad tidings of God
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @blind imitation [taqlid], @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction
